name: Style meeting minutes using CSS (colors, box model, text)

## Requirements
- [ ] Use multiple color formats (rgb, hex, hsl)
- [ ] Apply margin and padding (long and shorthand)
- [ ] Add borders with different properties
- [ ] Style text (color, alignment, decoration)
- [ ] Use at least 3 different units (relative and absolute)

## Notes
Focus on readability and structure of the page.
